text: I find myself in a modern, angular building, drawn into a space dedicated to research and development. There is an atmosphere of curiosity and quiet intensity; the transparent walls evoke both openness and the boundaries within which knowledge is explored. The presence of others absorbed in inquiry subtly reminds me that the pursuit of understanding is both a personal and collective endeavor. I feel contemplative, grateful to be swept along in a current of intellectual curiosity and reflection on how humanity and technology continually reshape each other.
